Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
59 
PA_APN_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Physician Assistant or Advanced Practice Nursing Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the physician assistant (PA) and advanced 
practice nursing provider (APN) category; ever in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PA_APN_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: PA_APN_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE:
